title: AV:LINK Avlink 113.154UK 3 m RJ45 U/UTP CCA Network Patch Cable - Grey
features: Solid 24AWG (CCA) copper clad aluminium twist pair
Capable of transmitting at GHz speed - for a fast connection
description: Product Description Avlink Economic copper clad aluminium network cable. 3 metres. Connect your LAN equipped devices (e.g. PC, Laptop, PS3, Xbox 360, BluRay Player) to you network or router. Grey lead allows devices to be connected in the home or office environment. Core diameter - 4 x 2 x 0.51mm. Colour - Grey. Overall diameter - 5.2mm. Length - 1.5m. Weight - 30g. Box Contains U/UTP lead
